title: CMC Vellore is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: CMC Vellore is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
